title: Graaff-Reinet Tourism launches plans for local Lions Club to boost community projects
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - In what rings in a new...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - In what rings in a new chapter of service for Graaff-Reinet, the local tourism office shared the exciting news that a Lions Club is being established in Graaff-Reinet.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - In what rings in a new chapter of service for Graaff-Reinet, the local tourism office shared the exciting news that a Lions Club is being established in Graaff-Reinet."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“As we step into 2026, exciting conversations have been taking place behind the scenes since October 2025 - all focused on strengthening our community and giving back where it matters most,” said Aljoné Meyer, tourism liaison officer and manager of Graaff-Reinet Tourism."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She said this decision was made after discussions with Lions Club International on 8 January.","html":"She said this decision was made after discussions with Lions Club International on 8 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A small introductory information session was hosted last week to begin laying the groundwork.","html":"A small introductory information session was hosted last week to begin laying the groundwork."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Several local NPOs were invited to ensure that the most pressing community needs were represented from the outset, keeping community upliftment at the heart of the initiative.","html":"Several local NPOs were invited to ensure that the most pressing community needs were represented from the outset, keeping community upliftment at the heart of the initiative."},{"type":"heading","text":"What will the Lions Club focus on?","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The proposed Graaff-Reinet Lions Club will work across key pillars that directly impact our town, including:","html":"The proposed Graaff-Reinet Lions Club will work across key pillars that directly impact our town, including:"},{"type":"list","items":["Vision and diabetes awareness","Hunger relief","Environmental protection","Childhood cancer support"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meyer said that foundational members and volunteers will be needed from the Graaff-Reinet community.","html":"Meyer said that foundational members and volunteers will be needed from the Graaff-Reinet community."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“With the initial logistics now in place, the doors are open for interested individuals to get involved."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Passionate community members are invited to step forward as foundational members or volunteers to help shape and guide this new chapter,” she said.","html":"Passionate community members are invited to step forward as foundational members or volunteers to help shape and guide this new chapter,” she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Interested parties are invited to please contact the Graaff-Reinet Tourism Office on 049 892 4248 for more information or to receive the information pack.","html":"Interested parties are invited to please contact the Graaff-Reinet Tourism Office on 049 892 4248 for more information or to receive the information pack."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Graaff-Reinet Tourism says that it is inspiring to see meaningful initiatives like this take root - a positive step forward as they begin the year with purpose, collaboration and care for the community.","html":"Graaff-Reinet Tourism says that it is inspiring to see meaningful initiatives like this take root - a positive step forward as they begin the year with purpose, collaboration and care for the community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Graaff-Reinet Tourism launches plans for local Lions Club to boost community projects
